message:
fix: remove duplicate key_collations field, doc comment formatting

- compat_persist.rs: remove 3 duplicate key_collations: Vec::new() from
  index descriptor construction (bug: duplicate field masked real value)
- parser.rs, vectorized_dispatch.rs, per_core_buffer.rs: reformat
  multi-line doc comments to rustdoc convention (summary + blank + detail)
- Update beads issue tracker metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -787,7 +787,6 @@ fn extract_unique_constraint_indexes_from_sql(sql: &str, table_name: &str) -> Ve
                 columns: vec![column.name.clone()],
                 key_expressions: Vec::new(),
                 key_sort_directions: vec![SortDirection::Asc],
-                key_collations: Vec::new(),
                 where_clause: None,
                 is_unique: true,
                 key_collations: vec![column.constraints.iter().find_map(|constraint| {
@@ -847,7 +846,6 @@ fn extract_unique_constraint_indexes_from_sql(sql: &str, table_name: &str) -> Ve
                 .iter()
                 .map(|indexed| indexed.direction.unwrap_or(SortDirection::Asc))
                 .collect(),
-            key_collations: Vec::new(),
             where_clause: None,
             is_unique: true,
             key_collations: normalized_terms
@@ -2901,7 +2899,6 @@ PRAGMA integrity_check;
                 columns: vec!["parent_id".to_owned(), "slug".to_owned()],
                 key_expressions: Vec::new(),
                 key_sort_directions: vec![SortDirection::Asc, SortDirection::Asc],
-                key_collations: Vec::new(),
                 where_clause: None,
                 is_unique: true,
                 key_collations: vec![],
